mission.title: Install and Configure Notary Project on Kubernetes
mission.description: Notation is a CLI tool designed to sign and verify artifacts in the OCI registry ecosystem, enhancing security similar to git commit signatures. Installing Notation allows you to ensure the integrity and authenticity of your container images.

steps.title: Install Notation CLI
steps.description:
Download the Notation CLI from GitHub releases:
```bash
# macOS (Apple Silicon)
curl -Lo notation.tar.gz https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/releases/download/v1.3.0/notation_1.3.0_darwin_arm64.tar.gz
tar xzf notation.tar.gz
sudo mv notation /usr/local/bin/
rm notation.tar.gz

# Linux (amd64)
curl -Lo notation.tar.gz https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/releases/download/v1.3.0/notation_1.3.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf notation.tar.gz
sudo mv notation /usr/local/bin/
rm notation.tar.gz
```
See https://notaryproject.dev/docs/user-guides/installation/cli/

steps.title: Generate a test signing key
steps.description:
Create a test signing key for development:
```bash
notation cert generate-test --default "test-key"
```
For production, use keys from Azure Key Vault, AWS Signer, or HashiCorp Vault.

steps.title: Sign a container image
steps.description:
Sign an image in an OCI registry:
```bash
notation sign myregistry.io/myimage:v1
```
This attaches a signature as an OCI artifact alongside the image.

steps.title: Verify a signed image
steps.description:
Verify the signature:
```bash
notation verify myregistry.io/myimage:v1
```

resolution.summary: Notation CLI is installed and can sign and verify OCI container images and artifacts.

upgrade.title: Download latest Notation release
upgrade.description:
Check https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/releases for the latest version and download:
```bash
curl -Lo notation.tar.gz https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/releases/latest/download/notation_linux_amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf notation.tar.gz
sudo mv notation /usr/local/bin/
```

troubleshooting.title: Registry authentication errors
troubleshooting.description:
Log in to your registry first:
```bash
docker login myregistry.io
```
Notation uses Docker credentials for registry access.

troubleshooting.title: Verification fails with trust policy error
troubleshooting.description:
Configure a trust policy:
```bash
notation policy init
```
Edit `~/.config/notation/trustpolicy.json` to configure trusted identities.

troubleshooting.title: Plugin not found for key type
troubleshooting.description:
For cloud-based keys, install the appropriate plugin:
```bash
notation plugin install azure-kv
```

prerequisites.description: No Kubernetes cluster required. Notation is a standalone CLI for signing OCI artifacts. An OCI registry is needed.
